summary:
POLITICAL ELECTIONS AND VOTING CORRUPTION: Brandon discusses recent reports of voter fraud in Pennsylvania, claiming that over two thousand fake ballots representing a large percentage of local votes were uncovered. He extends this focus to other political races, specifically emphasizing Darin Harbick, who is running for state representative in Oregon's House District 12, asking for his victory in a predominantly liberal state. Brandon also mentions political targets concerning electoral systems and voting machines in Nevada, Arizona, and Texas, while calling for a landslide victory and protection for Ted Cruz, alongside references to the Alabama Senate.

GLOBAL CONFLICT AND WAR ACCELERATION: Brandon recounts a previous vision involving an angel from the bottomless pit, identified as Apollyon, being released to influence Europe and Vladimir Putin. He connects this vision to current events, specifically the deployment of thousands of North Korean troops to assist the Russian army, interpreting this as an expected acceleration of global war and conflict accompanied by heavenly signs like comets and falling stars.

ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND BRICS CURRENCY: Brandon shares insights regarding a recent BRICS meeting involving leaders from Saudi Arabia, Russia, and China, specifically mentioning Xi Jinping. He describes a vision of these nations developing a digital currency to replace the American dollar, an initiative he associates with the Saudi Crown Prince, whom he identifies as the Antichrist. In response to this economic threat affecting Africa, the Middle East, and South America, Brandon mentions a scenario where Donald Trump creates a new currency with Mexico and Canada to strengthen the local economy.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF RESTORATION AND HARVEST: Brandon details a vision of four oak trees representing a four-year presidential term, marked by sudden initial economic hardship and darkness, followed by a period of restoration in the final two years. He describes this restoration as being powered by a supernatural power, leading to the rise of Brush Arbor churches, the dissolving of denominational barriers between Catholics, Baptists, and Methodists, and a massive global spiritual harvest.

SUPERNATURAL HEALING AND ASIA VISITATION: Brandon recounts a testimony of a woman whose arms were miraculously healed from a seventeen-year-old car accident injury during a tent revival. He discusses general physical healing and shares a prophetic message concerning a supernatural spiritual awakening destined for several Asian nations, explicitly listing China, Japan, Vietnam, North Korea, South Korea, Singapore, and the Philippines.
rawData: [October 26, 2024]-[Things that the Lord showed me a year ago are now in the news - a call to prayer - day 15]-[https://youtu.be/4NYl2q5EtZI]-[Good morning, family. How are you all doing today? I'm feeling better, so I appreciate your prayers. My throat feels stronger, my voice and all that, so I appreciate everybody praying for me, my wife, and my children. It's been some kind of virus, but God is good, and we're getting better in Jesus' name. You know, I guess every one of you has heard so many people talk about what we prayed. I told you all that we were praying for Pennsylvania, and sure enough, there was stuff uncovered in Pennsylvania this morning. I don't watch a lot of the news, but somebody sent emails to my wife telling her that we uncovered things in the spirit and it happened in the natural—2,000-some-odd fake ballots. She was reading me the article; it says they found out 60 percent of all the voting in that area was fake. To God be the glory; that was in Pennsylvania. Ladies and gentlemen, we are making a difference in the spirit realm, so I want to encourage you all that this is working. Of course, prayer works, so don't get weary in well-doing. You say, "I don't see anything," well, it doesn't matter what you see. We're not moved by what we see; we're not moved by what we feel; we're moved by what the word of God says. We stand on what the word says we can have and we can do, and we do whatever the Bible says we can do. I want to get excited about what God's doing already in just a couple of days of prayer with you all since I've been back from the prayer conference. I'm going to start doing things with different backgrounds, and I came outside in my backyard to take this video by my pink bushes because I thought it was kind of fun instead of doing it in the house. We had a politician's wife reach out to us asking for prayer. It sounds like they are spirit-filled if they watch this channel and are Christians who love the Lord, because they wouldn't be watching any other way, I guess. They're asking for prayer for his election because he's running for office in Oregon, of all places, where it's very liberal, so he needs a lot of prayer. Who is this, babe? Darin Harbick. Darin Harbick is running for state representative for House District 12 in Oregon. He's running for House District 12 in the House of Oregon. I hope she said that loud enough; I'll say it again: Darin Harbick is running for state representative for House District 12 here in Oregon. We're going to believe God with him today that he's going to have favor and that the people would come out in a liberal state and vote for him, because all things are possible to him that believe. Folks, I believe this is the time that we start to see the salt rise up in these last days and we become saltier. It's time that we become the flavor, the ones that people are looking to, saying, "Man, there's something different about them." I'm believing that Darin Harbick is going to come to a different level with the Lord in all of this and be able to help lead those liberals out of the darkness like Moses did. I gave the word about the acceleration of war in Europe over a year ago. I told you I saw the angel and the bottomless pit get released, and the Lord called this angel the great Apollyon. The Lord said it's going to be released from that pit, and I saw the angel go down and undo his chains. There was a huge lock, and those chains came off of him and he started spinning like a top all over Europe. He went over and started influencing Vladimir Putin. Here we see North Korea join in with Vladimir Putin, sending—some say 3,000 troops, some say 11,000 troops—to help the Russian army with their equipment and everything. We're seeing an acceleration of war just like the Lord warned you was coming, and he told me to tell you that this is not a time to shrink back; it's a time we take more land for Jesus. We're going to see wars and rumors of wars, pestilences, and plagues. Men's hearts will fail them for fear for looking after those things that are coming on the earth, and people are going to get all paranoid. But not the household of faith, not you and I, because we have a greater covenant. We understand who we are in Christ, and we understand that greater is He that is in me than he that is in the world. We're not of this world; we're joint heirs with Jesus Christ, seated with Him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers. Anytime I give a word, it's never for you to walk in fear; it's for you to understand the signs of the times. You have to get the revelation of Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 inside of your heart like a pillar. You need to be rooted and grounded in faith. Faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. Understanding the power and the authority of the name of Jesus is the only way you're going to survive what's coming. Great dark days are coming—gross darkness is coming on this earth—but great light will shine on us like it did with the children of Israel in Goshen. We will have the light on us; the light's going to get lighter and the dark is going to get darker. We keep our eyes on Jesus because He is our Redeemer and the lifter of our heads. We get excited about what God is doing through you and me. The only Jesus some people will see is the Jesus in you and the Jesus in me. Let them see that glory resonating on you like it did Moses. It's called coming up higher with the fire. He said, "Brandon, I want you to remind them that great sobering days are coming." But be ye filled with the Holy Spirit, overflowing on the new wine of the Holy Spirit. He used an illustration with me from Mary Poppins. I love to laugh, like Dick Van Dyke when they were bouncing on the ceilings, laughing and saying, "I love to laugh, ha ha ha!" Devil, you're not going to get my joy today; I'm bubbling with the Holy Ghost. We have to be filled with the Spirit because of those things coming upon us. I prophesied signs in the heaven—I didn't even know a comet was coming. Comment down below if you saw the comet about a week ago. The Lord warned me there will be fearful signs in the heavens, with asteroids and falling stars. I don't try to add to or take away from anything the Lord has shown me; I just tell you we pray. The Lord warned me about Pennsylvania, Texas and Ted Cruz, Nevada, and Arizona. He even showed me Alabama concerning the Senate. I get off on these rabbit trails, but I know the Lord has me say this for you. I want to tell you a really cool testimony. A lady walked up to us and told us she went to the revival when we were talking about the glory. She said for 17 years after a car accident, she wasn't able to lift her hands above her head. When the power of God came on her during that tent meeting, the Lord miraculously healed her arms. She was praising the Lord in front of us, lifting her hands; her arm was completely healed. She described the glory cloud as if she'd been dipped in gel and was just breathing it in. The power of God changed her life. It's time to go even higher. I warned you all about BRICS and everybody said, "October's been a big nothingburger." It ain't over yet! I said there's something about October regarding the financial sector that we have to watch. BRICS had a meeting October 22nd to the 24th, which was yesterday. They were talking about exactly what I told you: I saw the prince of Saudi Arabia, Russia, and Xi Jinping in a meeting privately talking about a digital platform with the BRICS nations so they could split away from using American dollars, using the BRICS dollar as the global currency. The prince, MBS—whom I believe is the Antichrist—was using that as a platform to come against America. Then I saw it fan out over Africa, the Middle East, and South America. I saw that Trump was in power and he had to create a new currency with Mexico and Canada to try to create a stronger dollar. I warned you about four oak trees, and the Lord said this represents four years of a presidency. In the first year, it came on suddenly and got very dark. People were not prepared and were struggling financially; everybody lost everything when the leaves fell off, though the oak tree stayed strong. People were wearing shorts and shirts, and the storm came in. The second year, people looked broke down, but the last two years, things started getting better. Those oak trees became plugged into 220-volt electric power and started glowing with the glory. Evangelism started coming forth out of the oak tree—out of an old 1950s tent revival microphone. That's when the Lord told me there will be great Brush Arbor churches and a great harvest revival coming again. There's going to be no denominational barriers; I saw all the Catholics, Baptists, and Methodists becoming one body with one purpose: to spread the good news of Jesus Christ. I'm believing for a billion-soul harvest. Today the Lord said, "Brandon, I'm calling you to do prayer." He said it will be unusual for you and your wife to pray on this camera and bring the glory into people's houses. What an honor to believe with you right now that He is your healer. I believe today is your day for healing. Let's not believe for tomorrow; let's believe for today. Reach out in simple faith, just like the woman with the issue of blood. Virtue went out of the Lord's body and she didn't bleed anymore. The same Holy Spirit is doing it even now. It's the Great Commission: we would lay hands on the sick and they would recover. The extraordinary should be ordinary. I like that; that's a T-shirt: "The extraordinary should be ordinary." I want you to believe God for the supernatural today—spirit, soul, and body. Don't accept anything the devil has for you. He bore all our sicknesses and carried all our griefs. Some people say, "I've had an abortion, God will never forgive me." Jesus loves you; He doesn't hold that against you. You've got to forgive yourself, repent, and turn from your wicked ways. The moment you confess it, He is there to forgive it. That's the moment you got rid of it and it was washed in the blood. Be bold about grace and renew your mind with scripture. If you confess your sins, He is faithful and just to cleanse you of all unrighteousness. Whatever the devil meant for bad, God will turn it for good in your favor. So let's believe God today for more uncovering of ballot corruption and exposing of darkness. Father, we thank You right now in the name of Jesus for every single person represented here and for Darin Harbick. Father, we lift up Darin Harbick before You and thank You for supernatural favor. I thank You that Oregon will turn red in the name of Jesus. I thank You for someone bold who has the confidence to run for office in a predominantly liberal state. I thank You that the righteous will come out and vote, and even the people who are not righteous would vote for him; they may not even know why, but they're just going to fill in his bubble. I thank You, Lord, that David-like boldness would rest on him, and when he wins, he will have supernatural wisdom like Solomon to lead that area out of their bondage. I thank You that it would spread through Portland and all of Oregon. We give it all to the glory of God. Father, we thank You that in Pennsylvania all those votes were uncovered; we know there's much more. We believe even in Texas this will be exposed. You have to tear off the bandage to clean the wound, and I thank You, Lord, that there is a cleaning of a nasty war wound. We believe these states are turning in a Red Wave in Jesus' name. I call for protection over Ted Cruz and his family. I pray that his time is not over yet and that this would be a landslide victory for him. We don't yell at the devil; we tell you to get under our feet because we have authority over you. We say, "Stop this now." We call our angels to war on our behalf today, God. We thank You, Lord, that these voting districts will not be corrupted by mail-in ballots or Dominion machines. We believe we receive Your hand on the situation concerning Nevada, Arizona, Texas, and Pennsylvania. We consider it done. We're not begging; we're believing. We're "believing believers." Lord, we thank You. I believe You're moving on behalf of America. I had a great bald eagle fly right over us the other day—two huge bald eagles flying in the sky over our house. I said, "Wow, Lord, that's prophetic." Father, we thank You for healthy kidneys for Joyce. She's always asking in the comment section, "I'm still standing for healthy kidneys for Joyce." Father, we stand with her. We believe her kidneys function and she doesn't have to go on dialysis anymore. You're a God of restoration. I thank You for every person believing for their lungs, minds, emotions, or hearts. You are the Healer. I call for the power of God to go through that camera right now and touch every person. Healing is going through this broadcast, through this screen, and over Your people. Satan, we've had enough; get your hands off God's property! We are healed and whole. Ladies and gentlemen, I believe you're healed. If you just received it, tell us about it. Father, I thank You for finances for every single person. I believe that as they go through this weekend, they receive supernatural ideas to create wealth. I call for an impartation of Your divine favor on their households. We call their marriages blessed and their children born again. We call you delivered from bad thoughts and tormented spirits. For whom the Son has set free is free indeed. We speak to the spirit of depression and intimidation: be gone in Jesus' name! Your word is life to those who find it and health to all their flesh. Well, we believe it and we all say, "Amen and amen." Thank you for joining me today. My son, Brandon, is trying to make a list of prayer requests. We are powerful together. Think about what sixty thousand people praying can do! The Lord told me to tell the people in Asia that there is a supernatural thing about to take place with prayer. I saw a great turning in Asia in the spirit realm. Asia is going to have a visitation from Jesus—China, Japan. The Lord said it seems in the natural that Asia has been forgotten, but what He's about to do in Asia is going to shake the world. He said, "Brandon, tell my people there's something about prayer concerning Asia—a turning as we intercede." We lift up China, Vietnam, Japan, South Korea, and North Korea. We speak that there will be a great harvest of souls. There will be anointing and the glory of God moved through these cameras over Singapore and the Philippines. God told me they're not forgotten. Do not grow weary in well-doing; be of good courage. There's going to be a great harvest in your nations, even Japan—all of it. It's going to be beautiful. If you haven't liked our videos, please like and subscribe. It helps us with the algorithm. Diana and I both rejoice with you. She's holding the camera today. "I'm trying my best; I don't know if I'm as good as Brandon." "Brandon's been doing it for so long, but I appreciate you doing it." Isn't it pretty out here? The atmosphere is good. Look at these tropical flowers. I love flowers; I used to do the flowers for a mega-ministry. I learned a lot from Brenda, the lady over the flowers. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and we love you. God bless you all, and we'll see you again tomorrow. Bye-bye, y'all!]
